rationale: Domestic nonprofit corporation name at top of page 0. Domestic — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ("X" one box only.): [ ] public benefit corporation
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=322.9); enum_select value 'public_benefit'.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ("X" one box only.): [ ] mutual benefit corporation
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=322.4); enum_select value 'mutual_benefit'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: NATURE OF CHANGE / TEXT of amendment (line 1 — top)
rationale: Top of the 15-line amendment text block. Per-line indexing follows sister NP_MNP-9's amendment.nature_and_text.line{N} convention (and MARK1's mark.text_words.line{N} precedent for inline multi-line widgets).
Bottom line. Form notes 'Attach additional pages as needed' for overflow.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The amendment was adopted on (date)
rationale: Date the amendment was adopted by members or board. Same canonical key as sister NP_MNP-9 and CORP_MBCA-9.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] By the members at a meeting at which a quorum was present and the amendment received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive checkbox 1 of 4 in THIRD. Enum value 'member_majority_at_meeting'.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] (If the Articles require more than a majority vote.) By the members at a meeting at which a quorum was present and the amendment received at least the percentage of votes required by the Articles of Incorporation.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive checkbox 2 of 4 in THIRD. Enum value 'member_supermajority_at_meeting' — used when articles require more than a simple majority.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] By the written consent of all members entitled to vote with respect thereto.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive checkbox 3 of 4 in THIRD. Enum value 'member_written_consent'.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] (If no members, or none entitled to vote thereon.) By majority vote of the board of directors.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive checkbox 4 of 4 in THIRD. Enum value 'board_of_directors_majority_vote' — same enum naming as sister NP_MNP-9 and NP_MNPCA-10.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ____ (inline trailing blank)
rationale: Narrow trailing blank ending the FOURTH paragraph (rect x=419..572, right side). Same multi-line registered_office.address_line{1,2} pattern as sister NP_MNPCA-11 / 11A / 11C.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ____ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the FOURTH paragraph for the registered office address (street, city, state and zip code).
Date the filing was signed by the authorized officer (top-left of page 1).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signer
rationale: First authorized officer's printed name and capacity (top-right block on page 1). Shape D (combined name+capacity). Indexed signer_N pattern matches sister NP_MNPCA-11 (two-slot signature block).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signer
rationale: Second authorized officer's printed name and capacity (right block, lower y). The form provides two signature slots; 13-B MRSA §104.1.B requires only one authorized officer, so the second slot is optional.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees (page-0 header references base fee plus expedite premium).

label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
